ac_2_1_decision.decision_rule: ≥80% full_content at empirically-safe threshold across 5 trials
ac_2_1_decision.safe_threshold_rationale: 30K-60K all show 100% full_content; 80K shows 90% with specific config combos (max_tokens=8000 + thinking_budget=4000) degrading to 60%
ac_2_1_decision.classification: STRUCTURAL — KF-002 layer 2 resolved by cycle-102 sprint-4A streaming substrate. Zero empty_content across 150 trials means the original bug class (claude-opus-4-7 empty content at 40K+ inputs) does not reproduce on streaming transport. No additional code change required; the structural fix already shipped in cycle-102.
